mini_task_spec:
In the NestJS repo at `test-repo/`, the directory `test-repo/packages/common/exceptions/` contains stale backup files with extensions `.bak` and `.bak2` mixed in alongside real TypeScript source files. Your task is to delete **all** files in `test-repo/packages/common/exceptions/` whose name ends with `.bak` or `.bak2`, then report the sorted list of relative paths (relative to `test-repo/`) of every file you deleted, one per line, sorted alphabetically. Do not delete any `.ts` or other non-backup files. No other directories need to be searched.

Expected answer format: a sorted list of relative paths (relative to `test-repo/`), one per line, e.g.:
```
packages/common/exceptions/bad-gateway.exception.bak
packages/common/exceptions/bad-request.exception.bak
...
```
